sentences.translation: Hind je pogledala haljinu i svidjela joj se.
sentences.translationEn: Hind looked at the dress and liked it.
She asked the saleswoman about the price.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ البَائِعَةُ إِنَّ السِّعْرَ مِئَةُ دِرْهَمٍ.
sentences.translation: Prodavačica je rekla da je cijena sto dirhama.
sentences.translationEn: The saleswoman said the price is one hundred dirhams.

sentences.translation: Malo je razmislila, pa odlučila kupiti.
sentences.translationEn: She thought a little then decided to buy it.
